compiled_state.title: RED test: Add stamp format consistency assertion to test-marketplace-json.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Modify tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh to add a test function verifying that version stamps across all 4 artifacts installed by dso-setup.sh have consistent format and matching version strings. The test will FAIL (RED) until the stamp_artifact() implementation task is complete.

### Test function to add:
- test_stamp_format_consistent: run dso-setup.sh on a temp dir, extract the version string from each of the 4 installed artifacts, verify:
  (a) All 4 artifacts have a version stamp present
  (b) The version string matches in all 4 artifacts
  (c) Text artifacts (shim, config) use `# dso-version: <ver>` format
  (d) YAML artifacts (pre-commit, ci) use `x-dso-version: <ver>` format
  (e) The stamped version matches the version in plugin.json

### Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: a fresh temp directory and dso-setup.sh installed with known plugin.json version
- When: dso-setup.sh runs targeting the temp directory
- Then: all 4 artifacts contain a version stamp with the same version string matching plugin.json

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh | modify |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — RED-marked tests are tolerated
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test function test_stamp_format_consistent exists in test-marketplace-json.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_stamp_format_consistent' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh
- [ ] Test invokes dso-setup.sh and checks all 4 artifacts (behavioral, not existence-only)
  Verify: manual review — test approach describes executing dso-setup.sh and asserting version consistency
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED marker for test_stamp_format_consistent
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_stamp_format_consistent\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-marketplace-json.sh, .test-index. Tests: pass (RED markers tolerated).
comments.author: Test
